headline: Broadcom Deepens AI Infrastructure Role With US$36b Deal And FuriosaAI Pact
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) is backing a record US$36b AI infrastructure financing tied to Anthropic and Google, acting as a payment backstop and credit anchor. The financing relates to AI chips and infrastructure, positioning Broadcom as both a technology supplier and a financial supporter of large scale AI deployments. Broadcom has also entered a partnership with FuriosaAI to co-develop next generation rack scale AI inference solutions that draw on its AI networking and advanced packaging...
